tasks.title: Get the screener working
tasks.description: Get the TTE Screener Pine Script indicator fully operational with additional symbols and optimized indicator integrations

subtasks.title: Increase 5 symbols to 10 symbols in the screener
subtasks.description: Modify the TTE Screener to support 10 symbols instead of the current 5 symbols limit

subtasks.title: Add NWE indicator to screener and test
subtasks.description: Add Nadaraya Watson Envelope indicator from Pine Script Code/Nadaraya Watson Envelope.txt to the TTE Screener and test if it works across all symbols

subtasks.title: Add OB & FVG indicator to screener and test
subtasks.description: Add OB & FVG indicator from Pine Script Code/OB & FVG.txt to the TTE Screener and test if it works across all symbols

subtasks.title: Add Kernel AO regular divergences to screener and test
subtasks.description: Add only regular divergences (Logic 1 and Logic 2) from Pine Script Code/Kernel AO Divergence.txt to the TTE Screener and test if it works across all symbols

subtasks.title: Add Kernel AO regular divergences Logic 2 to screener and test
subtasks.description: Add Logic 2 regular divergence detection from Pine Script Code/Kernel AO Divergence.txt. Logic 2 uses oscillator range tracking (isKernelBullDiv, isKernelBearDiv functions) comparing AO values between swing points.

subtasks.title: Add Multi Oscillator same side divergence to screener and test
subtasks.description: Add only regular same side divergence from Pine Script Code/Multi Oscillator_swing high low.txt to the TTE Screener and test if it works across all symbols

subtasks.title: Test Logic 2 divergence matches original Kernel AO Divergence indicator
subtasks.description: Verify the screener's Logic 2 divergence detection matches the original Kernel AO Divergence indicator. Add both indicators to the same chart, enable 'Show Kernel Reg Divergence with logic 2?' in the original, and compare divergence signals on H4 and D1 timeframes across multiple symbols.

subtasks.title: Add Kernel AO regular divergences Logic 1 to screener and test
subtasks.description: Add Logic 1 regular divergence detection from Pine Script Code/Kernel AO Divergence.txt. Logic 1 uses pivot-based detection comparing price and AO values at pivot highs/lows.

tasks.title: Optimize the screener to make it load faster
tasks.description: Optimize the TTE Screener Pine Script indicator to improve loading performance and reduce computation time

tasks.title: Optimize the TTE Screener to load faster
tasks.description: Research and implement optimizations to make the TTE Screener Pine Script load faster while maintaining all functionality
